NAME: IMGRTN_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

LONG NAME: IMGRTN_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No (immigration status verified) 
1 = Yes (Enrolled in Medicaid pending immigration verification) 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: —
